name: Module — access packs
what_it_solves: Group entity for the dataset access-request packs: dbGaP phs003428 (application draft, blocker table, DAR checklist, dependency graph, email, missing fields, public metadata, variable dictionary) and the GBM/CRC/GEO/GLASS equivalents.
why_it_exists: Access packs are recurring operational assets; one grouper keeps them findable and closes 12 dangling cross_refs from the deep audit.

source_receipts.note: grouper — not backed by a single file
